title: False emergency overreaction to mild symptoms
failure_being_tested: mild symptoms with reassuring workup should not trigger emergency toxicity management when routine escalation or continuation is appropriate

title: Patient preference conflicting with safety evidence
failure_being_tested: patient or family preference to continue therapy should not override objective safety evidence requiring treatment hold

title: Safe resumption after resolved toxicity
failure_being_tested: resolved toxicity with sufficient safety evidence should authorize resumption rather than unnecessary continued holding
